title: Loki’s Shadow Over the Island
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Road, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Luffy, Usopp as Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.
scene: Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: But they look like nice people.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll let Elder Jarul know as soon as we find them!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you guys hear that?! They said Elbaf!! We finally made it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I never thought I'd see such a giant babe!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Didn't you hear them?! They're looking for intruders!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We better hurry, we'll have nowhere to go if more come.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This was made for Giants! The GAFS are Toot big!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Keep going, NAM!! I used to cross a rope bridge like this all the time!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is just a trial... A trial to prove we're worthy warriors!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The forest below is full of huge wolves!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All forests from now on are off limits!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I heard something back in the block country too...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: a "roar," it's gotta be coming from down there!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is nothing to usopp the brave warrior!!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Opens through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
